title: When is NVLink Worth It?
excerpt: Nvidia doesn’t support NVLink on consumer GPUs anymore. The last one that had it available was the RTX 3090.
content_html:
Nvidia doesn’t support NVLink on consumer GPUs anymore. The last one that had it available was the RTX 3090.

Right now in April 2026, NVLink bridges are pretty expensive, $200-$400 depending on the exact size and whether you’re able to snipe one at retail. Since I have two 3090s, I wanted to test how much benefit NVLink actually provides for AI workloads.

The Tests

I ran a few tests to measure the effect that adding NVLink would have on AI-related workloads:

  • Model Inference with layer split and tensor parallelism. I used llama-bench with Llama 3.3 70B and Gemma 4 31B. Layer split does very little inter-GPU communication, while tensor parallel inference must sync at every layer.
  • Model Training using DDP for TinyLlama 1.1B and FSDP for Qwen2.5 3B. DDP only syncs once to compute gradients at each step, while FSDP requires constant data transfers.

With these, I felt I had a good mix of tests that would be affected to different degrees by inter-GPU bandwidth.

Hardware

CPU AMD Epyc 7532 (32 Cores, 128 PCIe lanes)
Motherboard Supermicro H12SSL-i, 5 PCIe 4.0 x16 Slots
RAM 8 Channels, 32GB DDR4-3200, 256GB total
GPU 2x EVGA RTX 3090, installed directly in slots 3 & 6, both running at full x16 bandwidth.
OS Ubuntu 24.04, Nvidia driver 595

Initial Results

The performance on all layer split tests was unaffected. For model inference with tensor parallelism, NVLink boosted prompt processing by about 30%, while token generation speed was exactly the same.

Token generation speed being the same on tensor parallel runs was unexpected. I thought there would be a large difference since it needs to sync activations frequently. Although token generation speed is usually the headline number, I still care a lot about prompt processing speed since most of my usage patterns, such as coding agents, use very long context windows.

The uplift for FSDP training is huge, a nearly 3x improvement. DDP training was not affected at all.

However, I consider this data to be somewhat misleading, as the non-NVLink tests were not actually measuring GPU data transfer over PCIe like I initially thought.

In all of my subsequent test configurations, inference with layer split, tensor parallel token generation, and DDP training were completely unaffected (within 3%/noise). I will omit any more charts/data for those tests and show only tensor parallel prompt processing and FSDP training. All data available here.

Pitfalls With Disabling NVLink For Tests

In my first test, I used NCCL_P2P_DISABLE=1 for my non-NVLink test. I had also set NCCL_DEBUG=INFO so I could verify that the GPUs were using the channel I expected. I noticed lines at test startup like this:

gpu:11419:11419 [0] NCCL INFO Channel 03 : 0[0] -> 1[1] via SHM/direct/direct

This means that instead of using P2P (Peer-to-Peer over PCIe), the GPUs were falling back to SHM (Shared Host Memory), which is a full round trip to main memory and incurs a higher performance penalty.

It’s not actually possible to specifically disable NVLink while it’s installed and force the GPUs to use P2P. NCCL_P2P_DISABLE=1 disables P2P over PCIe as well and transfers go over SHM.

I reran the tests by physically unplugging the NVLink bridge.

SHM vs P2P, Nvidia’s Restrictions

Even after unplugging the NVLink bridge, NCCL was still logging that it was using SHM. Nvidia disables P2P entirely on consumer GPUs, presumably for product segmentation. This is an artificial restriction by Nvidia at the driver level; the RTX 3090 and other consumer GPUs are capable of doing it. Some clever people have figured out how to bypass this restriction by patching the drivers, and the solution is pretty easy to install: open-gpu-kernel-modules.

I installed the patch and tested it again. I confirmed the NCCL log messages indicating that it was using P2P this time:

gpu:11090:11152 [1] NCCL INFO Channel 00/0 : 1[1] -> 0[0] via P2P/direct pointer

Results Using Actual P2P Communication

Enabling P2P almost entirely makes up the difference between SHM and NVLink. Prompt processing speeds are basically identical and FSDP training reaches over 90% of the performance of NVLink.

So why would anyone drop $300 on an NVLink bridge?

Consumer Platforms

NVLink doesn’t really have much of a benefit for my specific setup. I already have a server CPU & motherboard (Epyc 7532 + Supermicro H12SSL-i), which comes with multiple full PCIe Gen4 x16 slots. I can install multiple GPUs and each of them gets full x16 bandwidth. However, the average consumer is probably not using a server platform at home.

Consumer CPUs don’t have support for a lot of PCIe lanes. As a result, the motherboards for these CPUs don’t have many x16 slots. Some motherboards advertise 2 x16 slots, but what they actually mean is that they have two x16 sized slots, but only one of them has full x16 bandwidth. Furthermore, there’s a caveat that if you install a card into the second x16 sized slot, it will actually bifurcate the bandwidth from the main x16 slot and they will both run at x8/x8.

The two most expensive consumer motherboards I could find state in their specs that they, in fact, only have 1 full x16-bandwidth slot and that using the second one will result in an x8/x8 configuration.

MSI MEG X870E GODLIKE X EDITION Gigabyte Z890 AORUS XTREME AI TOP
$1300 $1000 ($1500-1800 retail)

These products are hilariously named/marketed (EXTREME AI and GODLIKE EDITION), but alas, consumer CPU limitations mean they cannot take full advantage of multiple GPUs, which is often the main way to upgrade an AI workflow. They have the exact same PCIe capabilities as much cheaper motherboards. For example the Asus ProArt B650 Creator retails for ~$230 and also supports x16 and x8/x8 modes on its 2 PCIe x16 slots.

In all of these cases, an NVLink bridge completely bypasses PCIe slot limitations and allows the GPUs to communicate at their maximum bandwidth.

I went into my BIOS and throttled my PCIe slots to x4 and again to x8 to simulate what would happen in a more common consumer setup.

Performance with PCIe x8 and x4

For tensor parallel inference, P2P sees a ~5% and ~15% drop at x8 and x4, respectively. The NVLink-based runs perform the same in all configurations and the SHM tests are much slower than both of the others.

Reducing PCIe lanes has a much more dramatic effect on FSDP training. Even the P2P driver patch starts to lose efficacy as it becomes restricted by PCIe bandwidth. With the P2P driver, if you were running on x8/x8, NVLink is about 50% faster and it doubles the training speed if the GPUs are on x4 bandwidth.

SHM Bottleneck

One interesting observation is that the SHM results don’t degrade as sharply as the P2P results. The x8 and x16 results were identical in all tests, with only a ~5% penalty at x4 in both prompt processing and training. This would indicate that the bottleneck for SHM is not PCIe lanes, but something else on the path to main memory.

Measuring GPU ↔︎ GPU Bandwidth Directly

To confirm each configuration while I was testing, I ran p2pBandwidthLatencyTest.

The reason for the results we saw is illustrated clearly here. NVLink provides the same 100GB/s bandwidth regardless of the underlying PCIe configuration. P2P over PCIe scales linearly with PCIe lanes, and SHM seems to bottleneck well below the available PCIe bandwidth.

Conclusion

NVLink is worth it in certain cases for people running dual GPUs at home. My setup, coincidentally, is one of the narrow exceptions where it isn’t.

NVLink makes sense if all of these are true

  • You’re not running Linux OR not willing to apply the third-party P2P driver patch (I couldn’t find a Windows equivalent)
  • You’re on a consumer platform where multiple GPUs drop PCIe to x8/x8 or lower
  • Your workload is FSDP training or, to a lesser degree, tensor-parallel prompt processing

Bandwidth between GPUs doesn’t affect all workloads evenly. FSDP training saw the largest gains in my tests, especially at lower PCIe lane widths, while tensor-parallel prompt processing saw moderate improvements.

It’s worth noting that my initial result with P2P disabled at the driver level is the experience most buyers would have out of the box. The patch is unofficial and Linux-only, so if you can’t or won’t apply it, an NVLink bridge becomes the only way to get the full benefit of multiple GPUs.

NVLink bridges are not cheap. Do the math: instead of buying an NVLink bridge, you may be able to buy into a workstation (like Threadripper) or server (like Epyc/Xeon) platform that gives you full x16 lanes natively.

blocks.html_en: This means that instead of using P2P (Peer-to-Peer over PCIe), the GPUs were falling back to SHM (Shared Host Memory), which is a full round trip to main memory and incurs a higher performance penalty.

sentences.en: This means that instead of using P2P (Peer-to-Peer over PCIe), the GPUs were falling back to SHM (Shared Host Memory), which is a full round trip to main memory and incurs a higher performance penalty.
sentences.zh: 这意味着 GPU 不再使用 P2P（PCIe 上的点对点），而是回退到 SHM（共享主机内存），这是到主内存的完整往返，会导致更高的性能损失。

blocks.html_en: It’s not actually possible to specifically disable NVLink while it’s installed and force the GPUs to use P2P. NCCL_P2P_DISABLE=1 disables P2P over PCIe as well and transfers go over SHM.

sentences.zh: 实际上不可能在安装时专门禁用 NVLink 并强制 GPU 使用 P2P。

sentences.en: NCCL_P2P_DISABLE=1 disables P2P over PCIe as well and transfers go over SHM.
sentences.zh: NCCL_P2P_DISABLE=1 也会禁用 PCIe 上的 P2P，并通过 SHM 进行传输。

blocks.html_en: I reran the tests by physically unplugging the NVLink bridge.

sentences.en: I reran the tests by physically unplugging the NVLink bridge.
sentences.zh: 我通过物理拔掉 NVLink 桥来重新运行测试。

blocks.html_en: SHM vs P2P, Nvidia’s Restrictions

sentences.en: SHM vs P2P, Nvidia’s Restrictions
sentences.zh: SHM 与 P2P，Nvidia 的限制

blocks.html_en: Even after unplugging the NVLink bridge, NCCL was still logging that it was using SHM. Nvidia disables P2P entirely on consumer GPUs, presumably for product segmentation. This is an artificial restriction by Nvidia at the driver level; the RTX 3090 and other consumer GPUs are capable of doing it. Some clever people have figured out how to bypass this restriction by patching the drivers, and the solution is pretty easy to install: open-gpu-kernel-modules.

sentences.en: Even after unplugging the NVLink bridge, NCCL was still logging that it was using SHM.
sentences.zh: 即使拔掉 NVLink 桥接器后，NCCL 仍然记录它正在使用 SHM。

sentences.en: Nvidia disables P2P entirely on consumer GPUs, presumably for product segmentation.
sentences.zh: Nvidia 在消费类 GPU 上完全禁用 P2P，大概是为了产品细分。

sentences.en: This is an artificial restriction by Nvidia at the driver level; the RTX 3090 and other consumer GPUs are capable of doing it.
sentences.zh: 这是Nvidia在驱动层面人为的限制； RTX 3090 和其他消费类 GPU 能够做到这一点。

sentences.en: Some clever people have figured out how to bypass this restriction by patching the drivers, and the solution is pretty easy to install: open-gpu-kernel-modules.
sentences.zh: 一些聪明的人已经找到了如何通过修补驱动程序来绕过此限制，并且该解决方案非常容易安装：open-gpu-kernel-modules。

blocks.html_en: I installed the patch and tested it again. I confirmed the NCCL log messages indicating that it was using P2P this time:

sentences.en: I installed the patch and tested it again.
sentences.zh: 我安装了补丁并再次测试。

sentences.en: I confirmed the NCCL log messages indicating that it was using P2P this time:
sentences.zh: 我确认了 NCCL 日志消息表明这次使用的是 P2P：

blocks.html_en: Results Using Actual P2P Communication

sentences.en: Results Using Actual P2P Communication
sentences.zh: 使用实际 P2P 通信的结果

blocks.html_en: Enabling P2P almost entirely makes up the difference between SHM and NVLink. Prompt processing speeds are basically identical and FSDP training reaches over 90% of the performance of NVLink.

sentences.en: Enabling P2P almost entirely makes up the difference between SHM and NVLink.
sentences.zh: 启用 P2P 几乎完全弥补了 SHM 和 NVLink 之间的差异。

sentences.en: Prompt processing speeds are basically identical and FSDP training reaches over 90% of the performance of NVLink.
sentences.zh: 即时处理速度基本相同，FSDP 训练达到 NVLink 性能的 90% 以上。

blocks.html_en: So why would anyone drop $300 on an NVLink bridge?

sentences.en: So why would anyone drop $300 on an NVLink bridge?
sentences.zh: 那么为什么有人愿意花 300 美元购买 NVLink 桥接器呢？

blocks.html_en: Consumer Platforms

sentences.en: Consumer Platforms
sentences.zh: 消费者平台

blocks.html_en: NVLink doesn’t really have much of a benefit for my specific setup. I already have a server CPU & motherboard (Epyc 7532 + Supermicro H12SSL-i), which comes with multiple full PCIe Gen4 x16 slots. I can install multiple GPUs and each of them gets full x16 bandwidth. However, the average consumer is probably not using a server platform at home.

sentences.en: NVLink doesn’t really have much of a benefit for my specific setup.
sentences.zh: NVLink 对于我的具体设置来说并没有多大好处。

sentences.en: I already have a server CPU & motherboard (Epyc 7532 + Supermicro H12SSL-i), which comes with multiple full PCIe Gen4 x16 slots.
sentences.zh: 我已经有一个服务器 CPU 和主板（Epyc 7532 + Supermicro H12SSL-i），它配备了多个完整的 PCIe Gen4 x16 插槽。

sentences.en: I can install multiple GPUs and each of them gets full x16 bandwidth.
sentences.zh: 我可以安装多个 GPU，每个 GPU 都可以获得完整的 x16 带宽。

sentences.en: However, the average consumer is probably not using a server platform at home.
sentences.zh: 然而，普通消费者可能在家中并不使用服务器平台。

blocks.html_en: Consumer CPUs don’t have support for a lot of PCIe lanes. As a result, the motherboards for these CPUs don’t have many x16 slots. Some motherboards advertise 2 x16 slots, but what they actually mean is that they have two x16 sized slots, but only one of them has full x16 bandwidth. Furthermore, there’s a caveat that if you install a card into the second x16 sized slot, it will actually bifurcate the bandwidth from the main x16 slot and they will both run at x8/x8.

sentences.en: Consumer CPUs don’t have support for a lot of PCIe lanes.
sentences.zh: 消费类 CPU 不支持大量 PCIe 通道。

sentences.en: As a result, the motherboards for these CPUs don’t have many x16 slots.
sentences.zh: 因此，这些 CPU 的主板没有很多 x16 插槽。

sentences.en: Some motherboards advertise 2 x16 slots, but what they actually mean is that they have two x16 sized slots, but only one of them has full x16 bandwidth.
sentences.zh: 有些主板宣传有 2 个 x16 插槽，但实际上他们的意思是有两个 x16 大小的插槽，但只有其中一个具有完整的 x16 带宽。

sentences.en: Furthermore, there’s a caveat that if you install a card into the second x16 sized slot, it will actually bifurcate the bandwidth from the main x16 slot and they will both run at x8/x8.
sentences.zh: 此外，需要注意的是，如果您将卡安装到第二个 x16 大小的插槽中，它实际上会将主 x16 插槽的带宽分开，并且它们都将以 x8/x8 运行。

blocks.html_en: The two most expensive consumer motherboards I could find state in their specs that they, in fact, only have 1 full x16-bandwidth slot and that using the second one will result in an x8/x8 configuration.

sentences.en: The two most expensive consumer motherboards I could find state in their specs that they, in fact, only have 1 full x16-bandwidth slot and that using the second one will result in an x8/x8 configuration.
sentences.zh: 我能找到的两款最昂贵的消费类主板在其规格中指出，事实上，它们只有 1 个完整的 x16 带宽插槽，而使用第二个插槽将导致 x8/x8 配置。

blocks.html_en: MSI MEG X870E GODLIKE X EDITION

sentences.en: MSI MEG X870E GODLIKE X EDITION
sentences.zh: 微星 MEG X870E GODLIKE X 版

blocks.html_en: Gigabyte Z890 AORUS XTREME AI TOP

sentences.en: Gigabyte Z890 AORUS XTREME AI TOP
sentences.zh: 技嘉 Z890 AORUS XTREME AI TOP

blocks.html_en: These products are hilariously named/marketed (EXTREME AI and GODLIKE EDITION), but alas, consumer CPU limitations mean they cannot take full advantage of multiple GPUs, which is often the main way to upgrade an AI workflow. They have the exact same PCIe capabilities as much cheaper motherboards. For example the Asus ProArt B650 Creator retails for ~$230 and also supports x16 and x8/x8 modes on its 2 PCIe x16 slots.

sentences.en: These products are hilariously named/marketed (EXTREME AI and GODLIKE EDITION), but alas, consumer CPU limitations mean they cannot take full advantage of multiple GPUs, which is often the main way to upgrade an AI workflow.
sentences.zh: 这些产品的命名/营销方式很搞笑（EXTREME AI 和 GODLIKE EDITION），但遗憾的是，消费者 CPU 的限制意味着它们无法充分利用多个 GPU，而这通常是升级 AI 工作流程的主要方式。

sentences.en: They have the exact same PCIe capabilities as much cheaper motherboards.
sentences.zh: 它们具有与便宜得多的主板完全相同的 PCIe 功能。

sentences.en: For example the Asus ProArt B650 Creator retails for ~$230 and also supports x16 and x8/x8 modes on its 2 PCIe x16 slots.
sentences.zh: 例如，华硕 ProArt B650 Creator 零售价约为 230 美元，其 2 个 PCIe x16 插槽还支持 x16 和 x8/x8 模式。

blocks.html_en: In all of these cases, an NVLink bridge completely bypasses PCIe slot limitations and allows the GPUs to communicate at their maximum bandwidth.

sentences.en: In all of these cases, an NVLink bridge completely bypasses PCIe slot limitations and allows the GPUs to communicate at their maximum bandwidth.
sentences.zh: 在所有这些情况下，NVLink 桥完全绕过 PCIe 插槽限制，并允许 GPU 以最大带宽进行通信。

blocks.html_en: I went into my BIOS and throttled my PCIe slots to x4 and again to x8 to simulate what would happen in a more common consumer setup.

sentences.en: I went into my BIOS and throttled my PCIe slots to x4 and again to x8 to simulate what would happen in a more common consumer setup.
sentences.zh: 我进入 BIOS，将 PCIe 插槽节流至 x4，然后再次节流至 x8，以模拟在更常见的消费者设置中会发生的情况。

blocks.html_en: Performance with PCIe x8 and x4

sentences.en: Performance with PCIe x8 and x4
sentences.zh: PCIe x8 和 x4 的性能

blocks.html_en: For tensor parallel inference, P2P sees a ~5% and ~15% drop at x8 and x4, respectively. The NVLink-based runs perform the same in all configurations and the SHM tests are much slower than both of the others.

sentences.en: For tensor parallel inference, P2P sees a ~5% and ~15% drop at x8 and x4, respectively.
sentences.zh: 对于张量并行推理，P2P 在 x8 和 x4 时分别下降了约 5% 和约 15%。

sentences.en: The NVLink-based runs perform the same in all configurations and the SHM tests are much slower than both of the others.
sentences.zh: 基于 NVLink 的运行在所有配置中执行相同的操作，并且 SHM 测试比其他两种测试慢得多。

blocks.html_en: Reducing PCIe lanes has a much more dramatic effect on FSDP training. Even the P2P driver patch starts to lose efficacy as it becomes restricted by PCIe bandwidth. With the P2P driver, if you were running on x8/x8, NVLink is about 50% faster and it doubles the training speed if the GPUs are on x4 bandwidth.

sentences.en: Reducing PCIe lanes has a much more dramatic effect on FSDP training.
sentences.zh: 减少 PCIe 通道对 FSDP 训练的影响更为显着。

sentences.en: Even the P2P driver patch starts to lose efficacy as it becomes restricted by PCIe bandwidth.
sentences.zh: 甚至 P2P 驱动程序补丁也开始失效，因为它受到 PCIe 带宽的限制。

sentences.en: With the P2P driver, if you were running on x8/x8, NVLink is about 50% faster and it doubles the training speed if the GPUs are on x4 bandwidth.
sentences.zh: 使用 P2P 驱动程序，如果您在 x8/x8 上运行，NVLink 的速度大约提高 50%，如果 GPU 使用 x4 带宽，则训练速度会加倍。

blocks.html_en: SHM Bottleneck

sentences.en: SHM Bottleneck
sentences.zh: 健康管理瓶颈

blocks.html_en: One interesting observation is that the SHM results don’t degrade as sharply as the P2P results. The x8 and x16 results were identical in all tests, with only a ~5% penalty at x4 in both prompt processing and training. This would indicate that the bottleneck for SHM is not PCIe lanes, but something else on the path to main memory.

sentences.en: One interesting observation is that the SHM results don’t degrade as sharply as the P2P results.
sentences.zh: 一项有趣的观察结果是，SHM 的结果不会像 P2P 的结果那样急剧下降。

sentences.en: The x8 and x16 results were identical in all tests, with only a ~5% penalty at x4 in both prompt processing and training.
sentences.zh: 在所有测试中，x8 和 x16 结果都是相同的，在即时处理和训练中，x4 的结果只有约 5% 的损失。

sentences.en: This would indicate that the bottleneck for SHM is not PCIe lanes, but something else on the path to main memory.
sentences.zh: 这表明 SHM 的瓶颈不是 PCIe 通道，而是主内存路径上的其他东西。

blocks.html_en: Measuring GPU ↔︎ GPU Bandwidth Directly

sentences.en: Measuring GPU ↔︎ GPU Bandwidth Directly
sentences.zh: 直接测量 GPU ↔︎ GPU 带宽

blocks.html_en: To confirm each configuration while I was testing, I ran p2pBandwidthLatencyTest.

sentences.en: To confirm each configuration while I was testing, I ran p2pBandwidthLatencyTest.
sentences.zh: 为了在测试时确认每个配置，我运行了 p2pBandwidthLatencyTest。

blocks.html_en: The reason for the results we saw is illustrated clearly here. NVLink provides the same 100GB/s bandwidth regardless of the underlying PCIe configuration. P2P over PCIe scales linearly with PCIe lanes, and SHM seems to bottleneck well below the available PCIe bandwidth.

sentences.en: The reason for the results we saw is illustrated clearly here.
sentences.zh: 这里清楚地说明了我们看到的结果的原因。

sentences.en: NVLink provides the same 100GB/s bandwidth regardless of the underlying PCIe configuration.
sentences.zh: 无论底层 PCIe 配置如何，NVLink 都提供相同的 100GB/s 带宽。

sentences.en: P2P over PCIe scales linearly with PCIe lanes, and SHM seems to bottleneck well below the available PCIe bandwidth.
sentences.zh: PCIe 上的 P2P 随 PCIe 通道线性扩展，而 SHM 似乎成为远低于可用 PCIe 带宽的瓶颈。

blocks.html_en: Conclusion

sentences.en: Conclusion
sentences.zh: 结论

blocks.html_en: NVLink is worth it in certain cases for people running dual GPUs at home. My setup, coincidentally, is one of the narrow exceptions where it isn’t.

sentences.en: NVLink is worth it in certain cases for people running dual GPUs at home.
sentences.zh: 对于在家中运行双 GPU 的人来说，在某些情况下 NVLink 是值得的。

sentences.en: My setup, coincidentally, is one of the narrow exceptions where it isn’t.
sentences.zh: 巧合的是，我的设置是少数例外之一。

blocks.html_en: NVLink makes sense if all of these are true

sentences.en: NVLink makes sense if all of these are true
sentences.zh: 如果所有这些都是真的，NVLink 就有意义

blocks.html_en: • You’re not running Linux OR not willing to apply the third-party P2P driver patch (I couldn’t find a Windows equivalent)

sentences.en: You’re not running Linux OR not willing to apply the third-party P2P driver patch (I couldn’t find a Windows equivalent)
sentences.zh: 您没有运行 Linux 或者不愿意应用第三方 P2P 驱动程序补丁（我找不到 Windows 等效补丁）

blocks.html_en: • You’re on a consumer platform where multiple GPUs drop PCIe to x8/x8 or lower

sentences.en: You’re on a consumer platform where multiple GPUs drop PCIe to x8/x8 or lower
sentences.zh: 您所在的消费平台上的多个 GPU 将 PCIe 降至 x8/x8 或更低

blocks.html_en: • Your workload is FSDP training or, to a lesser degree, tensor-parallel prompt processing

sentences.en: Your workload is FSDP training or, to a lesser degree, tensor-parallel prompt processing
sentences.zh: 您的工作负载是 FSDP 训练，或者在较小程度上是张量并行即时处理

blocks.html_en: Bandwidth between GPUs doesn’t affect all workloads evenly. FSDP training saw the largest gains in my tests, especially at lower PCIe lane widths, while tensor-parallel prompt processing saw moderate improvements.

sentences.en: Bandwidth between GPUs doesn’t affect all workloads evenly.
sentences.zh: GPU 之间的带宽不会均匀地影响所有工作负载。

sentences.en: FSDP training saw the largest gains in my tests, especially at lower PCIe lane widths, while tensor-parallel prompt processing saw moderate improvements.
sentences.zh: 在我的测试中，FSDP 训练取得了最大的进步，尤其是在 PCIe 通道宽度较低的情况下，而张量并行即时处理则取得了适度的改进。

blocks.html_en: It’s worth noting that my initial result with P2P disabled at the driver level is the experience most buyers would have out of the box. The patch is unofficial and Linux-only, so if you can’t or won’t apply it, an NVLink bridge becomes the only way to get the full benefit of multiple GPUs.

sentences.en: It’s worth noting that my initial result with P2P disabled at the driver level is the experience most buyers would have out of the box.
sentences.zh: 值得注意的是，我在驱动程序级别禁用 P2P 的初步结果是大多数买家开箱即用的体验。

sentences.en: The patch is unofficial and Linux-only, so if you can’t or won’t apply it, an NVLink bridge becomes the only way to get the full benefit of multiple GPUs.
sentences.zh: 该补丁是非官方的且仅适用于 Linux，因此如果您不能或不愿应用它，NVLink 桥将成为充分利用多个 GPU 优势的唯一途径。

blocks.html_en: NVLink bridges are not cheap. Do the math: instead of buying an NVLink bridge, you may be able to buy into a workstation (like Threadripper) or server (like Epyc/Xeon) platform that gives you full x16 lanes natively.

sentences.en: NVLink bridges are not cheap.
sentences.zh: NVLink 桥并不便宜。

sentences.en: Do the math: instead of buying an NVLink bridge, you may be able to buy into a workstation (like Threadripper) or server (like Epyc/Xeon) platform that gives you full x16 lanes natively.
sentences.zh: 计算一下：您可以购买工作站（如 Threadripper）或服务器（如 Epyc/Xeon）平台，而不是购买 NVLink 桥接器，从而为您提供完整的 x16 通道。

content_html_zh:
Nvidia 不再支持消费类 GPU 上的 NVLink。 最后一款可用的是 RTX 3090。

现在是 2026 年 4 月，NVLink 桥相当昂贵，为 200 至 400 美元，具体取决于具体尺寸以及您是否能够在零售店买到。 由于我有两个 3090，我想测试 NVLink 实际上为 AI 工作负载提供了多少好处。

测试

我进行了一些测试来衡量添加 NVLink 对 AI 相关工作负载的影响：

  • 具有层分割和张量并行性的模型推理。 我将 llama-bench 与 Llama 3.3 70B 和 Gemma 4 31B 一起使用。 层分割很少进行 GPU 间通信，而张量并行推理必须在每一层同步。
  • TinyLlama 1.1B 使用 DDP 进行模型训练，Qwen2.5 3B 使用 FSDP 进行模型训练。 DDP 在每一步仅同步一次来计算梯度，而 FSDP 需要持续的数据传输。

有了这些，我觉得我有了一个很好的测试组合，这些测试会在不同程度上受到 GPU 间带宽的影响。

硬件

CPU AMD Epyc 7532（32 核，128 个 PCIe 通道）
母板 Supermicro H12SSL-i，5 个 PCIe 4.0 x16 插槽
RAM 8 通道，32GB DDR4-3200，总共 256GB
GPU 2x EVGA RTX 3090，直接安装在插槽 3 和 6 中，均以全 x16 带宽运行。
OS Ubuntu 24.04，Nvidia 驱动程序 595

初步结果

所有层分割测试的性能均不受影响。 对于张量并行的模型推理，NVLink 将提示处理速度提高了约 30%，而令牌生成速度完全相同。

张量并行运行上的令牌生成速度相同是出乎意料的。 我认为会有很大的差异，因为它需要经常同步激活。 尽管令牌生成速度通常是头条新闻，但我仍然非常关心提示处理速度，因为我的大多数使用模式（例如编码代理）都使用很长的上下文窗口。

FSDP 培训的提升是巨大的，几乎提高了 3 倍。 DDP培训完全没有受到影响。

然而，我认为这个数据有些误导，因为非 NVLink 测试实际上并没有像我最初想象的那样测量 PCIe 上的 GPU 数据传输。

在我随后的所有测试配置中，层分割推理、张量并行令牌生成和 DDP 训练完全不受影响（在 3%/噪声以内）。 我将省略这些测试的更多图表/数据，仅显示张量并行提示处理和 FSDP 训练。 所有数据均可在此处获取。

禁用 NVLink 进行测试的陷阱

在我的第一个测试中，我使用 NCCL_P2P_DISABLE=1 进行非 NVLink 测试。 我还设置了 NCCL_DEBUG=INFO，这样我就可以验证 GPU 是否正在使用我期望的通道。 我注意到测试启动时的线路如下：

gpu:11419:11419 [0] NCCL INFO Channel 03 : 0[0] -> 1[1] via SHM/direct/direct

这意味着 GPU 不再使用 P2P（PCIe 上的点对点），而是回退到 SHM（共享主机内存），这是到主内存的完整往返，会导致更高的性能损失。

实际上不可能在安装时专门禁用 NVLink 并强制 GPU 使用 P2P。 NCCL_P2P_DISABLE=1 也会禁用 PCIe 上的 P2P，并通过 SHM 进行传输。

我通过物理拔掉 NVLink 桥来重新运行测试。

SHM 与 P2P，Nvidia 的限制

即使拔掉 NVLink 桥接器后，NCCL 仍然记录它正在使用 SHM。 Nvidia 在消费类 GPU 上完全禁用 P2P，大概是为了产品细分。 这是Nvidia在驱动层面人为的限制； RTX 3090 和其他消费类 GPU 能够做到这一点。 一些聪明的人已经找到了如何通过修补驱动程序来绕过此限制，并且该解决方案非常容易安装：open-gpu-kernel-modules。

我安装了补丁并再次测试。 我确认了 NCCL 日志消息表明这次使用的是 P2P：

gpu:11090:11152 [1] NCCL INFO Channel 00/0 : 1[1] -> 0[0] via P2P/direct pointer

使用实际 P2P 通信的结果

启用 P2P 几乎完全弥补了 SHM 和 NVLink 之间的差异。 即时处理速度基本相同，FSDP 训练达到 NVLink 性能的 90% 以上。

那么为什么有人愿意花 300 美元购买 NVLink 桥接器呢？

消费者平台

NVLink 对于我的具体设置来说并没有多大好处。 我已经有一个服务器 CPU 和主板（Epyc 7532 + Supermicro H12SSL-i），它配备了多个完整的 PCIe Gen4 x16 插槽。 我可以安装多个 GPU，每个 GPU 都可以获得完整的 x16 带宽。 然而，普通消费者可能在家中并不使用服务器平台。

消费类 CPU 不支持大量 PCIe 通道。 因此，这些 CPU 的主板没有很多 x16 插槽。 有些主板宣传有 2 个 x16 插槽，但实际上他们的意思是有两个 x16 大小的插槽，但只有其中一个具有完整的 x16 带宽。 此外，需要注意的是，如果您将卡安装到第二个 x16 大小的插槽中，它实际上会将主 x16 插槽的带宽分开，并且它们都将以 x8/x8 运行。

我能找到的两款最昂贵的消费类主板在其规格中指出，事实上，它们只有 1 个完整的 x16 带宽插槽，而使用第二个插槽将导致 x8/x8 配置。

微星 MEG X870E GODLIKE X 版 技嘉 Z890 AORUS XTREME AI TOP
$1300 1000 美元（零售价 1500-1800 美元）

这些产品的命名/营销方式很搞笑（EXTREME AI 和 GODLIKE EDITION），但遗憾的是，消费者 CPU 的限制意味着它们无法充分利用多个 GPU，而这通常是升级 AI 工作流程的主要方式。 它们具有与便宜得多的主板完全相同的 PCIe 功能。 例如，华硕 ProArt B650 Creator 零售价约为 230 美元，其 2 个 PCIe x16 插槽还支持 x16 和 x8/x8 模式。

在所有这些情况下，NVLink 桥完全绕过 PCIe 插槽限制，并允许 GPU 以最大带宽进行通信。

我进入 BIOS，将 PCIe 插槽节流至 x4，然后再次节流至 x8，以模拟在更常见的消费者设置中会发生的情况。

PCIe x8 和 x4 的性能

对于张量并行推理，P2P 在 x8 和 x4 时分别下降了约 5% 和约 15%。 基于 NVLink 的运行在所有配置中执行相同的操作，并且 SHM 测试比其他两种测试慢得多。

减少 PCIe 通道对 FSDP 训练的影响更为显着。 甚至 P2P 驱动程序补丁也开始失效，因为它受到 PCIe 带宽的限制。 使用 P2P 驱动程序，如果您在 x8/x8 上运行，NVLink 的速度大约提高 50%，如果 GPU 使用 x4 带宽，则训练速度会加倍。

健康管理瓶颈

一项有趣的观察结果是，SHM 的结果不会像 P2P 的结果那样急剧下降。 在所有测试中，x8 和 x16 结果都是相同的，在即时处理和训练中，x4 的结果只有约 5% 的损失。 这表明 SHM 的瓶颈不是 PCIe 通道，而是主内存路径上的其他东西。

直接测量 GPU ↔︎ GPU 带宽

为了在测试时确认每个配置，我运行了 p2pBandwidthLatencyTest。

这里清楚地说明了我们看到的结果的原因。 无论底层 PCIe 配置如何，NVLink 都提供相同的 100GB/s 带宽。 PCIe 上的 P2P 随 PCIe 通道线性扩展，而 SHM 似乎成为远低于可用 PCIe 带宽的瓶颈。

结论

对于在家中运行双 GPU 的人来说，在某些情况下 NVLink 是值得的。 巧合的是，我的设置是少数例外之一。

如果所有这些都是真的，NVLink 就有意义

  • 您没有运行 Linux 或者不愿意应用第三方 P2P 驱动程序补丁（我找不到 Windows 等效补丁）
  • 您所在的消费平台上的多个 GPU 将 PCIe 降至 x8/x8 或更低
  • 您的工作负载是 FSDP 训练，或者在较小程度上是张量并行即时处理

GPU 之间的带宽不会均匀地影响所有工作负载。 在我的测试中，FSDP 训练取得了最大的进步，尤其是在 PCIe 通道宽度较低的情况下，而张量并行即时处理则取得了适度的改进。

值得注意的是，我在驱动程序级别禁用 P2P 的初步结果是大多数买家开箱即用的体验。 该补丁是非官方的且仅适用于 Linux，因此如果您不能或不愿应用它，NVLink 桥将成为充分利用多个 GPU 优势的唯一途径。

NVLink 桥并不便宜。 计算一下：您可以购买工作站（如 Threadripper）或服务器（如 Epyc/Xeon）平台，而不是购买 NVLink 桥接器，从而为您提供完整的 x16 通道。
